title: Company Settings
noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

feedbackSharing.toggleLabel: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
feedbackSharing.toggleHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
feedbackSharing.description: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.

companyPackages.description: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.

general.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
general.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.

appearance.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
appearance.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.

hiring.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
hiring.requireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

invites.generateHint: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invites.hintTooltip: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.

dangerZone.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.

org.selectCompany: Select a company to view the org chart.

companies.deleteConfirm: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.

instanceSettings.schedulerHeartbeatsDescription: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceSettings.noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
instanceSettings.disableAllConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?

experimental.heading: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.

isolatedWorkspaces.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
isolatedWorkspaces.description: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.

autoRestartDevServer.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
autoRestartDevServer.description: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
